---
title: Introduction to Algorithms
---

## Contents

1. [Introduction](01 Introduction.qmd)

2. [Problem Statements](02 Problem Statements.qmd)

3. [Step Breakdown And Control Flow](03 Step Breakdown And Control Flow.qmd)

4. [Flowcharts](04 Flowcharts.qmd)

5. [Repetition](05 Repetition.qmd)

6. [Efficiency And Runtime](06 Efficiency And Runtime.qmd)

7. [Computer Programs And Pseudocode](07 Computer Programs And Pseudocode.qmd)

8. [A Tangled Web](08 A Tangled Web.qmd)
